productDisplayName: Spykar Men Ranger Solid Navy Blue Shirts
description: Composition Navy blue shirt made of 100% cotton, with full hand sleeves that have a mid-sleeve buttoned flap, front buttoned placket, tipped collar with red tape detailing on the inseam of the collar, brand badge embroidered on the left chest and curved hemline Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash in warm water Wash only with like colours Use mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Use warm iron Stylish to the hilt, this navy blue shirt from spykar is a great addition to your wardrobe. Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Pair it with denims or corduroys and suede shoes to look like the king of casual wear. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
